MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: L. Fong, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, April 16, 2014:
Plaintiff Conard House Inc. is represented by Ken Bounthavy
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Larry Holmes is present.
Attorney Josephine L. Alioto appears for defendant by limited scope representation.

Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Room 501A, for settlement discussions. This case does not settle. The trial date of April 21, 2014 remains.
